sessions.title: Sprint 1 mid-flight — GATE-0 + #45 done, #52-A partial, #54-A audit done, council kill-criterion locked
sessions.yesterday: M1-M3 shipped 2026-06-13 to 15 (doctrine gate, /check page, Stepped Reader, Portfolio Strip, 419→436 tests). M4 audit-fix sprint added freshness propagation, portfolio_as_of vs valuation_as_of split, float coercion. Council ran 2026-06-16 on strategic direction (Option E: ship #47 first, time-boxed research, Teaching Prompt Library v0 as Markdown for 5 real decisions before UI). PM workflow ran 2026-06-17 producing Sprint 1 plan with 6 lens specialists + 6 adversarial verifiers — all 6 rank-1 picks refuted, synthesizer responded by inserting non-code GATE-0 ahead of features. GATE-0 committed to repo as docs/decision-log/README.md with kill criterion (3 documented decisions by 2026-09-15) and 5-step interim trading protocol.
sessions.today: Started 2026-06-18: dispatched #52-A NotebookLM duplicate audit (28 notebooks, 8 duplicate groups, 9 deletions proposed). Phase 2 cleanup workflow ran in background while #45 (date math) and #54-A (corpus audit) ran in parallel. #45 shipped: calendar-day arithmetic, valuation_age_label field, 441 tests pass. #54-A surfaced: 11 of 16 transcripts disconnected from doctrine pipeline — 2026-06-11--untitled holds densest portfolio coverage but disconnected by #27 slug-collision. #52-A completed 5 of 9 ops (META-VR + ZETA-VR + AAPL-VR deleted, 2 renames, AMZN migration), 4 blocked by Claude Code auto-mode permission classifier. User chose to defer 4 stragglers to #52-B architecture fix. Logged backlog #55 (retry-with-rollback for fragile pipeline ops).
sessions.blockers: None. Sprint 1 next: #53 whisper Hebrew silent crash (1d), then #54-B re-run doctrine extraction with 11 disconnected transcripts, then #47 render Roni takes on /check, then #52-B + 4 NotebookLM stragglers.
